name: mcp-migration-auditor
description: One skill that scans MCP server configs (.mcp.json, claude_desktop_config.json, settings files) against the verified breaking changes in the MCP 2026-07-28 specification release candidate — stateless transport (Mcp-Session-Id removed), roots/sampling/logging deprecations, experimental Tasks migration, OAuth hardening — and outputs a per-server BREAKS/DEGRADED/SAFE table with rule citations and a prioritized migration checklist. Every audit rule cites an official source; stdio-only setups get an honest all-clear, not false alarms.
